title: Hardware Problems
drDigitalIntro: Hardware problems involve the physical parts of your computer: the screen, keyboard, trackpad, battery, or speakers. Symptoms include: screen flickering, keys not responding, trackpad not clicking, battery draining very fast, or speakers making no sound. First try a restart — sometimes hardware glitches clear. Check System Settings to confirm the hardware is recognized. Serious hardware problems usually need an professional repair.

playgroundTask.question: Your computer's keyboard randomly types the wrong letters. What is the most likely cause?

options.text: A hardware or driver issue with the keyboard itself
You have too many browser tabs open
Your the cloud storage is full

drDigitalSuccess: Keyboard issues are hardware or driver problems — not related to WiFi or storage. A restart is the first thing to try.
drDigitalHint: The keyboard is physical hardware. Which option is related to physical hardware behavior?
